User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

Memory.title: Memory
Memory.description: Represents a shared memory for a specific date.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Memory entity (YYYY-MM-DD).

userSentences.description: An object mapping user IDs to their sentences for the day.

reactions.description: An array of user reactions to the memory.

chatMessages.description: An array of chat messages associated with the memory.

lastRead.description: An object mapping user IDs to the timestamp of their last read.

lastMessageTimestamp.description: The server timestamp of the last chat message added.

UserMemoryReaction.title: UserMemoryReaction
UserMemoryReaction.description: Represents a user's reaction to a specific memory.

userId.description: The user ID who made the reaction.

reaction.description: The user's reaction to the memory (e.g., emoji).

UserMemoryChatMessage.title: UserMemoryChatMessage
UserMemoryChatMessage.description: Represents a user's chat message on a specific memory.

userId.description: The user ID who sent the message.

text.description: The content of the chat message.

userName.description: The name of the user who sent the message.

timestamp.description: The client-side timestamp when the message was created.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores user profiles. The userId must match the authenticated user's UID.

/memories/{memoryId}.description: Stores shared memories, reactions, and chats. Any authenticated user can read and write.
